calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Vacated

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Structured Settlement.
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-01-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Ted Mechtenberg, Esq., and Paul R. Huber, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Petitioner:
Valentin Moreno, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Roselyn Moreno present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined through Court Spanish Interpreter Maritza Ayerdi and Ruebin Guerra, sworn.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and
compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $250,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $62,500.00 payable to Law Firm of Da Vega Fisher Mechtenberg LLP
Costs: $69,242.50
A net balance of $ 180,757.50 to be deposited into a Structured Settlement at:
Pacific Life Insurance Company with a guaranteed lump sum payment when Minor reaches the
age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor into Structured Settlement.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 14, 2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of
receipt for the deposit of money into Structured Settlement.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514
prior to Hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-04-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Off Calendar
